title: Chrome MCP UI Verification Checklist for CEO
description: Write a comprehensive manual Chrome MCP verification checklist covering all dashboard panels, game canvas, WebSocket updates, responsive layout, and edge cases.

dod.criterion: Checklist covers all panels with specific expected behaviors and pass/fail checkboxes

tasks.title: Write complete Chrome MCP verification checklist
tasks.scope: Create tests/e2e/chrome-mcp-checklist.md covering: prerequisites/server startup, GameHeader buttons, SidePanel tabs, TeamPanel, ActionPanel/DirectivePanel, StatusPanel, LogPanel, CanvasOffice interactions, WebSocket live updates, responsive layout, edge cases. Each section has specific checks with expected behavior.

dod.criterion: Checklist covers all 8 panel components + GamePage + CanvasOffice
Each check item has: what to look at, expected behavior, pass/fail checkbox
Interactive elements covered: click targets, keyboard nav, panel switching
Responsive checks for desktop and mobile viewports
